meta.title: Unpwning A Building
meta.description: Peter Panholzer on S4x22’s Stage 2: Technical Deep Dives tells the story of a KNX-based building automation system that was attacked and taken out of operation. The twist in the story is Peter’s team had to hack the hacked BAS to get the BCU key so they could recover control of BAS … a vulnerability saved the day.
